# Next.js App Router

## Why this folder exists

Routing layer only. Pages import from features/ and components/; business logic stays out of app/.

## What is here

- (site)/ — public marketing routes
- planner/ — planner marketing + workspace routes
- api/ — Route handlers (server)
- css/ — shared FOCSS (tokens, bundles)
- admin/, crm/, ops/ — portal routes

## Rules

- No heavy business logic in page files
- CSS tokens live in app/css/, not inline in routes

## See also

- `docs/CSS-ARCHITECTURE.md`
